titleStmt.title: SII 20.332: original edition by G. S. Gai
No. 332. (B.K. No. 78 of 1935-36.) KALKĒRI, HANGAL TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT.

summary.p: The inscription which is engraved in continuation of No. 228 above, records gifts of land by nāḷprabhu, Chaladaṁkarāma, Hariyama-Seṭṭi and others to Mūṟujāvidēva at the time of Śivarātri. It also records gifts of land and money-income, to god Svayaṁbhudēva of Kalukere by the eight Hiṭṭus and others. In characters of about the 13th century A.D.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
© svasti śrī
manmahāpasāytaṁ paramavisvāsigaḷu huliya jaṁguḷi
ya mottada kaḷpamudreya vāsiyaṇnanoḷagāda sama
stanāyakaruṁ Ekkaṭigaruṁ śrīmannāḷprabhu caladaṁ
karāma kalukeṟeya hariymaseṭṭiyaruṁ sivarātreya
parvvadalli dēvara jaḷagaṁdhākṣate puṣpa dhūpa dīpa nivē
dya tāṁbūḷa Ācāriyara tapōdhanara brāhmaṇara bhōjanakkaṁ jī
rṇnōddhārakkanteṁdu mattihaḷḷiya heggaḍeya baḍagaṇa kēriya
saṁkina yēriya keḷage bisu kaṁ 10 Ā sthaḷidalli hakkalu kaṁ
20 maṁ nāḷprabhu caladaṁkarāma hariyamaseṭṭiyaruṁ ma
ga vikkamagēdanuṁ mūṟujāvidēvara pādaprakṣāḷanaṁ
māḍi dhārāpūrvvakaṁ māḍi koṭṭaru . svasti śrīmaṁnā
ḷprabhu hariyamaseṭṭiyaru maga virayanu
banadeyanāyaka jōyanāyaka rāgavanāyaka
sēnaba caṭṭayya Ekkaṭigaruṁ caitrada parvvadalli dē
variṁge ho jaḷa gaṁdhākṣate puṣpa
dhūpa dīpa nivēdya tāṁbūḷa tapōdhanara brāhmaṇa
ra Āhāradānakkaṁ jīrnnoddhārakkaṁ ha
geṟeya keḷage hiriya kōlalli gadde kaṁ 10
śrīmatu syaṁbudēvarige Iḍikiseṭṭiyara sama
sta prajegaḷu Eṁṭu hiṭṭugaḷu dēvaru
mūṟu ho(ṁ)nna vṛddhi Iṁda Oṁdu naṁdādīvige
ya naḍasuvaru Iḍikiseṭṭi puṇya
© svasti śrīmatu sarvvādhikāri lakumeyarāhuta drō
ṇapāḷadēvaṁge binnapaṁ geIdu kalukeṟeya śrī svayaṁ
bhudēvara Aṁgabhōgakaṁ jīrnnōddhārakaṁ gadeya haḷa bhū
miya dhāreya Eṟadu koṭṭaru Arematta ©
Digital edition of SII 20.332 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
